title: pilosella hispidissima
intro: Pilosella hispidissima, also known as Rough Hawk's-beard, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family, Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pilosella hispidissima include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Pilosella hispidissima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies and folk medicine.
